message.content:
Based on your startup profile (early-stage Agriculture & DeepTech startup in Karnataka), I searched the active database and found **3 highly matched opportunities**.

Here are the top matches in order of compatibility:

| Grant Name | Provider | Max Amount | Match Score | Key Benefit |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)** | DPIIT, Government of India | ₹50,00,000 | 98% (Strong) | Ideal for proof-of-concept, prototype trials, and market entry. |
| **BIRAC Biotech Ignition Grant (BIG)** | BIRAC, Department of Biotechnology | ₹50,00,000 | 92% (High) | High-quality seed support for bio-innovations & agritech devices. |
| **Karnataka Startup Advancement Grant** | KSUM, Government of Karnataka | ₹20,00,000 | 85% (Good) | State-sponsored grant for Karnataka-based registered entities. |

*Note: A total of 15 other lower-match options are registered. Let me know if you would like me to list all of them.*

How would you like to proceed? Try clicking **'Check my eligibility for Startup India Seed Fund Scheme'** or **'Draft a proposal for Startup India Seed Fund Scheme'**.
